はじまりのうみ.short_effect: Creates heavy rain, which has all the properties of Rain Dance, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Fire moves to fail.

おわりのだいち.name: Desolate Land
おわりのだいち.short_effect: Creates extremely harsh sunlight, which has all the properties of Sunny Day, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Water moves to fail.

デルタストリーム.name: Delta Stream
デルタストリーム.short_effect: Creates a mysterious air current, which cannot be replaced and causes moves to never be super effective against Flying Pokémon.

にげごし.name: Wimp Out
にげごし.short_effect: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.

ききかいひ.name: Emergency Exit
ききかいひ.short_effect: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.

みずがため.name: Water Compaction
みずがため.short_effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by two stages when it's hit by a Water move.

リミットシールド.name: Shields Down
リミットシールド.short_effect: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.

はりこみ.name: Stakeout
はりこみ.short_effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.

はがねつかい.name: Steelworker
はがねつかい.short_effect: This Pokémon's Steel moves have 1.5× power.

ヒーリングシフト.name: Triage
ヒーリングシフト.short_effect: This Pokémon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.

エレキスキン.name: Galvanize
エレキスキン.short_effect: This Pokémon's Normal moves are Electric and have their power increased to 1.2×.

ぎょぐん.name: Schooling
ぎょぐん.short_effect: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.

きずなへんげ.name: Battle Bond
きずなへんげ.short_effect: Transforms this Pokémon into Ash-Greninja after fainting an opponent.  Water Shuriken's power is 20 and always hits three times.

スワームチェンジ.name: Power Construct
スワームチェンジ.short_effect: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.

ぜったいねむり.name: Comatose
ぜったいねむり.short_effect: This Pokémon always  acts as though it were Asleep.

おどりこ.name: Dancer
おどりこ.short_effect: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.

バッテリー.name: Battery
バッテリー.short_effect: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.

ビビッドボディ.name: Dazzling
ビビッドボディ.short_effect: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.

ソウルハート.name: Soul-Heart
ソウルハート.short_effect: This Pokémon's Special Attack rises by one stage every time any Pokémon faints.

カーリーヘアー.name: Tangling Hair
カーリーヘアー.short_effect: When this Pokémon takes regular damage from a contact move, the attacking Pokémon's Speed lowers by one stage.

かがくのちから.name: Power of Alchemy
かがくのちから.short_effect: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

ビーストブースト.name: Beast Boost
ビーストブースト.short_effect: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.

ＡＲシステム.name: RKS System
ＡＲシステム.short_effect: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.

サイコメイカー.name: Psychic Surge
サイコメイカー.short_effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.

ミストメイカー.name: Misty Surge
ミストメイカー.short_effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.

グラスメイカー.name: Grassy Surge
グラスメイカー.short_effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Grassy Terrain.

メタルプロテクト.name: Full Metal Body
メタルプロテクト.short_effect: Other Pokémon cannot lower this Pokémon's stats.

ファントムガード.name: Shadow Shield
ファントムガード.short_effect: When this Pokémon has full HP, regular damage from moves is halved.

リベロ.name: Libero
リベロ.short_effect: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.

たまひろい.name: Ball Fetch
たまひろい.short_effect: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

わたげ.name: Cotton Down
わたげ.short_effect: When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

スクリューおびれ.name: Propeller Tail
スクリューおびれ.short_effect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

うのミサイル.name: Gulp Missile
うのミサイル.short_effect: If a Cramorant with Gulp Missile uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey and changes its form depending on its remaining HP.

じょうききかん.name: Steam Engine
じょうききかん.short_effect: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

パンクロック.name: Punk Rock
パンクロック.short_effect: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.

アイスフェイス.name: Ice Face
アイスフェイス.short_effect: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.

パワースポット.name: Power Spot
パワースポット.short_effect: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.

はがねのせいしん.name: Steely Spirit
はがねのせいしん.short_effect: Powers up ally Pokémon's Steel-type moves.

ほろびのボディ.name: Perish Body
ほろびのボディ.short_effect: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

ごりむちゅう.name: Gorilla Tactics
ごりむちゅう.short_effect: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

かがくへんかガス.name: Neutralizing Gas
かがくへんかガス.short_effect: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.

パステルベール.name: Pastel Veil
パステルベール.short_effect: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.

しろのいななき.name: Chilling Neigh
しろのいななき.short_effect: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.

くろのいななき.name: Grim Neigh
くろのいななき.short_effect: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.

とれないにおい.name: Lingering Aroma
とれないにおい.short_effect: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

こぼれダネ.name: Seed Sower
こぼれダネ.short_effect: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

ねつこうかん.name: Thermal Exchange
ねつこうかん.short_effect: Raises Attack when hit by a Fire-type move. Cannot be burned.

いかりのこうら.name: Anger Shell
いかりのこうら.short_effect: When the Pokémon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.

こんがりボディ.name: Well-Baked Body
こんがりボディ.short_effect: Immune to Fire-type moves, and Defense is sharply boosted.

かぜのり.name: Wind Rider
かぜのり.short_effect: Gives immunity to wind moves, and causes the Pokémon's Attack to increase by one stage when hit by one.

ばんけん.name: Guard Dog
ばんけん.short_effect: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.

ふうりょくでんき.name: Wind Power
ふうりょくでんき.short_effect: When hit by a wind move, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.

しれいとう.name: Commander
しれいとう.short_effect: Goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field.

こだいかっせい.name: Protosynthesis
こだいかっせい.short_effect: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.

クォークチャージ.name: Quark Drive
クォークチャージ.short_effect: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.

わざわいのうつわ.name: Vessel of Ruin
わざわいのうつわ.short_effect: Lowers Special Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

わざわいのつるぎ.name: Sword of Ruin
わざわいのつるぎ.short_effect: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

わざわいのおふだ.name: Tablets of Ruin
わざわいのおふだ.short_effect: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

わざわいのたま.name: Beads of Ruin
わざわいのたま.short_effect: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

ひひいろのこどう.name: Orichalcum Pulse
ひひいろのこどう.short_effect: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.

ハドロンエンジン.name: Hadron Engine
ハドロンエンジン.short_effect: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.

きょうえん.name: Costar
きょうえん.short_effect: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.

きんしのちから.name: Mycelium Might
きんしのちから.short_effect: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.

しんがん.name: Mind’s Eye
しんがん.short_effect: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

どくのくさり.name: Toxic Chain
どくのくさり.short_effect: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.

おもかげやどし.name: Embody Aspect
おもかげやどし.short_effect: Embody Aspect boosts a particular stat, depending on the form of a Terastallized Ogerpon

テラスチェンジ.name: Tera Shift
テラスチェンジ.short_effect: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.

テラスシェル.name: Tera Shell
テラスシェル.short_effect: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

ゼロフォーミング.name: Teraform Zero
ゼロフォーミング.short_effect: As soon as Terapagos assumes its Stellar Form, it will immediately neutralize weather and terrain effects.

どくくぐつ.name: Poison Puppeteer
どくくぐつ.short_effect: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.

fire-punch.name: Fire Punch
fire-punch.desc: 10% chance to burn the target. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

ice-punch.name: Ice Punch
ice-punch.desc: 10% chance to freeze the target. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

thunder-punch.name: Thunder Punch
thunder-punch.desc: 10% chance to paralyze the target. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

guillotine.name: Guillotine
guillotine.desc: 30% accuracy; faints the target in one hit (OHKO). No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

swords-dance.name: Swords Dance
swords-dance.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.desc: Priority -6 (moves last). Forces the target to switch out. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness, so it never misses. Bypasses Protect-type defensive moves and Substitute.

fly.name: Fly
fly.desc: Flies up on the first turn and attacks on the second turn. While airborne, it avoids most moves except certain ones such as Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Hurricane.

bind.name: Bind
bind.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

horn-drill.name: Horn Drill
horn-drill.desc: 30% accuracy; faints the target in one hit (OHKO). No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

body-slam.name: Body Slam
body-slam.desc: Never misses and deals 2x power against a target using Minimize. 30% chance to paralyze.

wrap.name: Wrap
wrap.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

thrash.name: Thrash
thrash.desc: The user becomes locked in (rampage) and attacks for 2-3 consecutive turns. Afterward, the user becomes confused for 1-4 turns.

double-edge.name: Double-Edge
double-edge.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/3 of the damage dealt.

bite.name: Bite
bite.desc: 30% chance to cause the target to flinch.

roar.name: Roar
roar.desc: Priority -6 (moves last). Sound-based move. Forces the target to switch out. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness, so it never misses. Bypasses Protect-type defensive moves and Substitute.

sing.name: Sing
sing.desc: Sound-based move. Puts the target to sleep. Bypasses Substitute.

disable.name: Disable
disable.desc: Prevents the target from using its last-used move for 4 turns.

surf.name: Surf
surf.desc: Deals 2x damage if the target is underwater (using Dive).

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.desc: 10% chance to freeze the target. Never misses in snow.

hyper-beam.name: Hyper Beam
hyper-beam.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

low-kick.name: Low Kick
low-kick.desc: Power increases the heavier the target is (20-120), determined by weight: under 10kg = 20, under 25kg = 40, under 50kg = 60, under 100kg = 80, under 200kg = 100, 200kg or more = 120.

counter.name: Counter
counter.desc: Priority -5 (moves last). Returns 2x the damage taken from the target's physical attack. In Double Battles, it targets only the last move that hit the user. Ignores type matchups, but has no effect on Ghost-type Pokémon.

seismic-toss.name: Seismic Toss
seismic-toss.desc: Deals fixed damage equal to the user's level (Lv. 50).

leech-seed.name: Leech Seed
leech-seed.desc: Each turn, drains 1/8 of the target's max HP and restores the user's HP by that amount. The effect carries over even if the user switches out. No effect on Grass-type Pokémon.

growth.name: Growth
growth.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1 stage each. Raised by 2 stages each in harsh sunlight.

solar-beam.name: Solar Beam
solar-beam.desc: Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second turn. In harsh sunlight, it attacks immediately with no charge turn; in rain, snow, or sandstorm, its power is halved (1/2).

poison-powder.name: Poison Powder
poison-powder.desc: Poisons the target. No effect on targets holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type, Steel-type, or Poison-type.

stun-spore.name: Stun Spore
stun-spore.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Pokémon holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type or Electric-type.

sleep-powder.name: Sleep Powder
sleep-powder.desc: Puts the target to sleep. No effect on targets holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type.

petal-dance.name: Petal Dance
petal-dance.desc: The user becomes locked in (rampage) and attacks for 2-3 consecutive turns. Afterward, the user becomes confused for 1-4 turns.

string-shot.name: String Shot
string-shot.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

fire-spin.name: Fire Spin
fire-spin.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

thunder-wave.name: Thunder Wave
thunder-wave.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Ground-type or Electric-type Pokémon.

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.desc: 30% chance to paralyze the target. Never misses in rain; accuracy drops to 50% in harsh sunlight. Hits even when the target is using Sky Drop, Bounce, or Fly.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.desc: Also hits targets in the semi-invulnerable state of Dig, dealing double damage. Power is halved (1/2) on Grassy Terrain.

fissure.name: Fissure
fissure.desc: Causes the target to faint in one hit. No effect on Flying-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

dig.name: Dig
dig.desc: On the first turn the user digs underground; on the second turn it attacks. While underground, the user avoids most moves except a few such as Earthquake.

toxic.name: Toxic
toxic.desc: Badly poisons the target (damage increases each turn: 1/16, 2/16, 3/16…). Never misses when used by a Poison-type. No effect on Poison- or Steel-type Pokémon.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

agility.name: Agility
agility.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

quick-attack.name: Quick Attack
quick-attack.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first.

night-shade.name: Night Shade
night-shade.desc: Deals fixed damage equal to the user's level. No effect on Normal-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

screech.name: Screech
screech.desc: A sound move. Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages. Bypasses Substitute.

double-team.name: Double Team
double-team.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1 stage.

recover.name: Recover
recover.desc: Restores 50% of the user's maximum HP.

minimize.name: Minimize
minimize.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. However, certain moves such as Body Slam, Heat Crash, and Flying Press never miss and deal double damage against the user.

light-screen.name: Light Screen
light-screen.desc: For 5 turns, halves damage from the opponent's special attacks. With multiple allies (Double Battles), reduces to 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Remains in effect after switching.

haze.name: Haze
haze.desc: Resets the stat stage changes of all Pokémon.

reflect.name: Reflect
reflect.desc: For 5 turns, halves damage from the opponent's physical attacks. With multiple allies (Double Battles), reduces to 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Remains in effect after switching.

focus-energy.name: Focus Energy
focus-energy.desc: Raises the user's critical-hit ratio by 2 stages. Fails if already in effect.

waterfall.name: Waterfall
waterfall.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

amnesia.name: Amnesia
amnesia.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

high-jump-kick.name: High Jump Kick
high-jump-kick.desc: If it misses or fails, the user loses HP equal to half (1/2) of its maximum HP.

glare.name: Glare
glare.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Electric-type Pokémon.

leech-life.name: Leech Life
leech-life.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

sky-attack.name: Sky Attack
sky-attack.desc: Critical-hit ratio +1. Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second. 30% chance to make the target flinch.

transform.name: Transform
transform.desc: Transforms into the target, copying everything except HP, held item, and status conditions. All copied moves have 5 PP. The transformation is undone upon switching out.

acid-armor.name: Acid Armor
acid-armor.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

rest.name: Rest
rest.desc: Fully restores HP and cures any status condition, then the user falls asleep for 2 turns, waking on the third turn.

rock-slide.name: Rock Slide
rock-slide.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

tri-attack.name: Tri Attack
tri-attack.desc: 20% chance to inflict one of paralysis, burn, or freeze on the target (chosen at random).

super-fang.name: Super Fang
super-fang.desc: Cuts the target's HP by half of its remaining HP (deals 1 damage when the target has 1 HP). No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

substitute.name: Substitute
substitute.desc: The user spends 1/4 of its maximum HP to create a substitute that takes hits in its place. The substitute disappears once it has taken damage equal to 1/4 of the user's maximum HP. Sound moves and similar moves still hit the user directly.

thief.name: Thief
thief.desc: Steals the target's held item, but only if the user is not holding an item.

snore.name: Snore
snore.desc: A sound move. Can only be used while the user is asleep. 30% chance to make the target flinch. Bypasses Substitute.

curse.name: Curse
curse.desc: If the user is Ghost-type: it spends 1/2 of its maximum HP to curse the target (the target loses 1/4 of its maximum HP each turn). Otherwise: lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage and raises its Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

flail.name: Flail
flail.desc: The lower the user's remaining HP, the higher the power (20–200).

cotton-spore.name: Cotton Spore
cotton-spore.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages. No effect on Grass-type Pokémon, those with the Overcoat Ability, or those holding Safety Goggles.

reversal.name: Reversal
reversal.desc: The lower the user's remaining HP, the higher the power (20–200).

spite.name: Spite
spite.desc: Reduces the PP of the target's last used move by 4.

protect.name: Protect
protect.desc: A priority +4 move that goes first. Completely blocks the target's move for one turn. Success rate drops to 1/3 when used consecutively.

mach-punch.name: Mach Punch
mach-punch.desc: A priority +1 move that goes first. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

scary-face.name: Scary Face
scary-face.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

sweet-kiss.name: Sweet Kiss
sweet-kiss.desc: Confuses the target for 1 to 4 turns.

belly-drum.name: Belly Drum
belly-drum.desc: Uses up half of the user's max HP to maximize its Attack stat.

mud-slap.name: Mud-Slap
mud-slap.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

spikes.name: Spikes
spikes.desc: A trap that damages the target when it switches in. Can be stacked up to 3 times: 1 layer = max HP/8, 2 layers = max HP/6, 3 layers = max HP/4. No effect on Flying-type Pokémon or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability.

destiny-bond.name: Destiny Bond
destiny-bond.desc: The user enters the Destiny Bond state. If the user is knocked out by the target's attack before the user's next turn, the target also faints.

perish-song.name: Perish Song
perish-song.desc: A sound move. After 3 turns, all Pokémon that were on the field when it was used (including the user) faint. Pokémon that switch out lose the effect. Hits through Substitute.

icy-wind.name: Icy Wind
icy-wind.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

detect.name: Detect
detect.desc: A priority +4 move that goes first. Completely blocks the target's move for one turn. Success rate drops to 1/3 when used consecutively.

bone-rush.name: Bone Rush
bone-rush.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

lock-on.name: Lock-On
lock-on.desc: On the next turn, the user's move never misses against the target it was used on.

outrage.name: Outrage
outrage.desc: The user enters a rampaging state, attacking for 2 to 3 turns in a row. Afterward, it becomes confused for 1 to 4 turns.

sandstorm.name: Sandstorm
sandstorm.desc: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for 5 turns. Pokémon other than Rock, Ground, and Steel types take damage equal to max HP/16 each turn. Rock-type Pokémon get a 1.5x boost to Sp. Def.

giga-drain.name: Giga Drain
giga-drain.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

endure.name: Endure
endure.desc: A priority +4 move that goes first. Endures with 1 HP even from an attack that would knock the user out. Success rate drops to 1/3 when used consecutively.

charm.name: Charm
charm.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

swagger.name: Swagger
swagger.desc: Confuses the target for 1 to 4 turns, but raises the target's Attack by 2 stages.

steel-wing.name: Steel Wing
steel-wing.desc: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

mean-look.name: Mean Look
mean-look.desc: Prevents the target from fleeing or switching out, except for Ghost-type Pokémon. The effect ends when the user leaves the field.

attract.name: Attract
attract.desc: When the target is the opposite gender of the user, it becomes infatuated. While infatuated, there is a 50% chance the target cannot attack the user. Fails if the user and target are the same gender, or if either one's gender is unknown.

sleep-talk.name: Sleep Talk
sleep-talk.desc: Can only be used while the user is asleep. Randomly uses one of the user's known moves. Only this move consumes PP.

heal-bell.name: Heal Bell
heal-bell.desc: A sound move. Cures the status conditions of the user and all allied Pokémon. The effect works even on allies behind a Substitute.

safeguard.name: Safeguard
safeguard.desc: Protects the user's side with Safeguard for 5 turns. Blocks status conditions and confusion. Remains in effect even after switching out.

pain-split.name: Pain Split
pain-split.desc: Sets the HP of both the user and the target to the average of their remaining HP (added together and divided by 2).

dynamic-punch.name: Dynamic Punch
dynamic-punch.desc: 100% chance to confuse the target for 1 to 4 turns. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

baton-pass.name: Baton Pass
baton-pass.desc: Switches out with an ally, passing on stat changes and other effects.

encore.name: Encore
encore.desc: For 3 turns, the target can only repeat the move it just used. The effect ends when the move's PP reaches 0.

rapid-spin.name: Rapid Spin
rapid-spin.desc: Removes binding effects on the user (such as Whirlpool, Bind, Wrap, Leech Seed, etc.) and entry hazards on the user's side (such as Stealth Rock, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, etc.). After attacking, 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

sweet-scent.name: Sweet Scent
sweet-scent.desc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 2 stages.

iron-tail.name: Iron Tail
iron-tail.desc: 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

morning-sun.name: Morning Sun
morning-sun.desc: Restored HP varies with the weather: normal = max HP/2, harsh sunlight = 2/3, rain/snow/sandstorm = 1/4.

synthesis.name: Synthesis
synthesis.desc: Restored HP varies with the weather: normal = max HP/2, harsh sunlight = 2/3, rain/snow/sandstorm = 1/4.

moonlight.name: Moonlight
moonlight.desc: Restored HP varies with the weather: normal = max HP/2, harsh sunlight = 2/3, rain/snow/sandstorm = 1/4.

cross-chop.name: Cross Chop
cross-chop.desc: Raises the critical-hit ratio by 1 stage.

rain-dance.name: Rain Dance
rain-dance.desc: Changes the weather to rain for 5 turns. Water-type moves get a 1.5x boost, and Fire-type moves are halved.

sunny-day.name: Sunny Day
sunny-day.desc: Changes the weather to harsh sunlight for 5 turns. Fire-type moves get a 1.5x boost, Water-type moves are halved, and freezing is prevented.

crunch.name: Crunch
crunch.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

mirror-coat.name: Mirror Coat
mirror-coat.desc: Priority -5 (moves last). Reflects 2x the damage of the foe's special attack. In Double Battles, only the last special attack taken counts. No effect on Dark-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchup.

psych-up.name: Psych Up
psych-up.desc: Copies the foe's stat stage changes onto the user.

ancient-power.name: Ancient Power
ancient-power.desc: 10% chance to raise the user's Speed, Sp. Def, Sp. Atk, Defense, and Attack by 1 stage each.

shadow-ball.name: Shadow Ball
shadow-ball.desc: 20% chance to lower the foe's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

future-sight.name: Future Sight
future-sight.desc: Deals damage 2 turns later. If the user switches out, the damage hits the Pokémon in the same position. Type matchup applies.

whirlpool.name: Whirlpool
whirlpool.desc: Traps the foe (4–5 turns), dealing 1/8 of max HP at the end of each turn. Non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out. Also hits foes that are underwater (using Dive), with 2x damage.

beat-up.name: Beat Up
beat-up.desc: Strikes consecutively once for each healthy Pokémon in the party (including the user).

fake-out.name: Fake Out
fake-out.desc: Priority +3 (moves first). 100% chance to cause flinch. Only succeeds on the user's first turn after entering battle.

uproar.name: Uproar
uproar.desc: Sound move. Attacks for 3 consecutive turns, during which no Pokémon can fall asleep. Bypasses Substitute.

stockpile.name: Stockpile
stockpile.desc: Raises the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1 stage each. Increases the Stockpile count by 1 (up to 3). Affects the effects of Swallow and Spit Up.

spit-up.name: Spit Up
spit-up.desc: Power increases with the Stockpile count (1=100 / 2=200 / 3=300). The Defense and Sp. Def stages gained from Stockpile are reset. Fails if Stockpile has not been used.

swallow.name: Swallow
swallow.desc: Restores HP based on the Stockpile count (1=1/4 of max HP, 2=1/2 of max HP, 3=full HP). The Defense and Sp. Def stages gained from Stockpile are reset. Fails if Stockpile has not been used.

torment.name: Torment
torment.desc: After use, the foe cannot use the same move twice in a row.

flatter.name: Flatter
flatter.desc: Confuses the foe for 1–4 turns, but raises the foe's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

will-o-wisp.name: Will-O-Wisp
will-o-wisp.desc: Burns the foe. No effect on Fire-type Pokémon.

memento.name: Memento
memento.desc: The user faints, but lowers the foe's Attack and Sp. Atk by 2 stages each.

facade.name: Facade
facade.desc: While the user is poisoned, paralyzed, or burned, power is doubled. Not affected by the Attack halving from burn.

focus-punch.name: Focus Punch
focus-punch.desc: Priority -3 (moves last). Fails if the user is hit by a move before attacking. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

follow-me.name: Follow Me
follow-me.desc: Priority +2 (moves first). That turn, the user takes all of the foes' moves aimed at allies (excluding spread/multi-target moves). For Double Battles.

charge.name: Charge
charge.desc: Doubles the power of the user's next Electric-type move (one time only). Also raises the user's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.desc: For 3 turns, the foe can only use attacking moves (status moves are sealed).

helping-hand.name: Helping Hand
helping-hand.desc: Priority +5 (moves first). For 1 turn, raises an ally's move power by 1.5x.

trick.name: Trick
trick.desc: Swaps held items between the user and the foe. Succeeds even if only one side holds an item.

role-play.name: Role Play
role-play.desc: Changes the user's Ability to match the foe's. Signature Abilities cannot be copied.

wish.name: Wish
wish.desc: At the end of the turn after next, restores 50% of max HP. Also targets the Pokémon that switches into that position.

ingrain.name: Ingrain
ingrain.desc: Restores 1/16 of max HP each turn, but the user can no longer switch out. Ground-type moves can also hit the user even if it is Flying-type or has the Levitate Ability.

superpower.name: Superpower
superpower.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

recycle.name: Recycle
recycle.desc: Recovers the item the user last consumed. Fails if the user is holding an item.

brick-break.name: Brick Break
brick-break.desc: Removes the foe's Aurora Veil, Reflect, and Light Screen before attacking.

yawn.name: Yawn
yawn.desc: Makes the foe drowsy, putting it to sleep at the end of the next turn. The effect is removed if that Pokémon switches out. Never misses, ignoring accuracy and evasiveness.

knock-off.name: Knock Off
knock-off.desc: If the foe is holding an item, power is boosted 1.5x and the item is knocked away. The item is restored after the battle.

endeavor.name: Endeavor
endeavor.desc: Deals damage equal to the foe's remaining HP minus the user's remaining HP. Fails if the foe's HP is less than or equal to the user's. No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon; otherwise ignores type matchup.

eruption.name: Eruption
eruption.desc: Power decreases as the user's remaining HP gets lower (1–150).

skill-swap.name: Skill Swap
skill-swap.desc: Swaps Abilities between the user and the foe. Signature Abilities cannot be swapped.

imprison.name: Imprison
imprison.desc: The user becomes sealed. Until it leaves the field, the foe cannot use any move that the user knows.

dive.name: Dive
dive.desc: Dives underwater on the first turn and attacks on the second. While underwater, the user avoids all moves except certain ones such as Surf and Whirlpool.

feather-dance.name: Feather Dance
feather-dance.desc: Lowers the foe's Attack by 2 stages.

blaze-kick.name: Blaze Kick
blaze-kick.desc: Critical-hit ratio +1. 10% chance to burn the foe.

poison-fang.name: Poison Fang
poison-fang.desc: 50% chance to badly poison (toxic) the target. Toxic damage starts at 1/16 and increases each turn. Resets to 1/16 on switching out.

crush-claw.name: Crush Claw
crush-claw.desc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

blast-burn.name: Blast Burn
blast-burn.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

hydro-cannon.name: Hydro Cannon
hydro-cannon.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

meteor-mash.name: Meteor Mash
meteor-mash.desc: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

weather-ball.name: Weather Ball
weather-ball.desc: Becomes Fire-type in harsh sunlight, Water-type in rain, Ice-type in snow, and Rock-type in sandstorm, with power doubled (2x).

fake-tears.name: Fake Tears
fake-tears.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

overheat.name: Overheat
overheat.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

rock-tomb.name: Rock Tomb
rock-tomb.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

metal-sound.name: Metal Sound
metal-sound.desc: Sound-based move. Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

tickle.name: Tickle
tickle.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage and Defense by 1 stage.

cosmic-power.name: Cosmic Power
cosmic-power.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 1 stage and Sp. Def by 1 stage.

water-spout.name: Water Spout
water-spout.desc: Power decreases the lower the user's remaining HP (1 to 150).

shadow-punch.name: Shadow Punch
shadow-punch.desc: Never misses, ignoring accuracy and evasiveness. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

extrasensory.name: Extrasensory
extrasensory.desc: 10% chance to make the target flinch.

sand-tomb.name: Sand Tomb
sand-tomb.desc: Traps the target (4 to 5 turns). While trapped, the target takes damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP at the end of each turn and cannot switch out unless it is a Ghost-type.

sheer-cold.name: Sheer Cold
sheer-cold.desc: Causes the target to faint in one hit (OHKO). No effect on Ice-type Pokémon. When used by a non-Ice-type Pokémon, its accuracy drops to 20%.

muddy-water.name: Muddy Water
muddy-water.desc: 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

bullet-seed.name: Bullet Seed
bullet-seed.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

aerial-ace.name: Aerial Ace
aerial-ace.desc: Never misses, ignoring accuracy and evasiveness.

icicle-spear.name: Icicle Spear
icicle-spear.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

iron-defense.name: Iron Defense
iron-defense.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

block.name: Block
block.desc: Prevents the target from fleeing or switching out, unless it is a Ghost-type. The effect ends when the user leaves the field.

howl.name: Howl
howl.desc: Sound-based move. Raises the Attack of the user and all allies by 1 stage.

frenzy-plant.name: Frenzy Plant
frenzy-plant.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

bulk-up.name: Bulk Up
bulk-up.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 1 stage and Defense by 1 stage.

bounce.name: Bounce
bounce.desc: On the first turn the user flies up; on the second turn it attacks. 30% chance to paralyze. While airborne, the user is unaffected by all moves except a few such as Smack Down, Thunder, and Hurricane.

mud-shot.name: Mud Shot
mud-shot.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

covet.name: Covet
covet.desc: Steals the target's held item, but only if the target is not holding an item.

volt-tackle.name: Volt Tackle
volt-tackle.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/3 of the damage dealt. 10% chance to paralyze the target.

calm-mind.name: Calm Mind
calm-mind.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage and Sp. Def by 1 stage.

dragon-dance.name: Dragon Dance
dragon-dance.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 1 stage and Speed by 1 stage.

rock-blast.name: Rock Blast
rock-blast.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

water-pulse.name: Water Pulse
water-pulse.desc: 20% chance to confuse the target for 1 to 4 turns.

roost.name: Roost
roost.desc: Restores HP by 1/2 of max HP. During that turn, the user is not treated as a Flying-type.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.desc: For 5 turns, the accuracy of all Pokémon is multiplied by 1.67x. Ground-type moves hit Pokémon with Levitate or Flying-type. Floating moves such as Fly and Bounce are negated.

hammer-arm.name: Hammer Arm
hammer-arm.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

gyro-ball.name: Gyro Ball
gyro-ball.desc: Power increases the lower the target's Speed is compared to the user (25 × target's Speed ÷ user's Speed + 1, max 150).

healing-wish.name: Healing Wish
healing-wish.desc: The user faints in exchange for fully restoring the HP and curing the status conditions of the next Pokémon sent out (PP is not restored).

feint.name: Feint
feint.desc: A first-strike move with priority +2. Lifts protection moves such as King's Shield, Baneful Bunker, Detect, and Protect, then attacks.

pluck.name: Pluck
pluck.desc: Steals the target's held Berry and immediately eats it itself.

tailwind.name: Tailwind
tailwind.desc: For 4 turns, doubles the Speed of the user and its allies.

acupressure.name: Acupressure
acupressure.desc: Randomly raises one of the user's stats by 2 stages (one of Attack/Defense/Sp. Atk/Sp. Def/Speed/accuracy/evasiveness).

metal-burst.name: Metal Burst
metal-burst.desc: Reflects 1.5x the final damage taken. Fails if no damage was taken. Ignores type matchups.

u-turn.name: U-turn
u-turn.desc: After attacking, the user switches out with a party Pokémon.

close-combat.name: Close Combat
close-combat.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1 stage each.

payback.name: Payback
payback.desc: Power is doubled when the user moves after the target.

assurance.name: Assurance
assurance.desc: Power is doubled if the target has already taken damage this turn.

fling.name: Fling
fling.desc: The effect changes based on the user's held item. The thrown item is lost after use.

power-trick.name: Power Trick
power-trick.desc: Swaps the user's Attack and Defense stats. Stat stages are not changed.

gastro-acid.name: Gastro Acid
gastro-acid.desc: Nullifies the target's Ability (no effect on Abilities tied to form such as Disguise or Stance Change, and on certain signature Abilities).

copycat.name: Copycat
copycat.desc: Attacks the target with the last move that was used. The user's own moves can also be copied.

power-swap.name: Power Swap
power-swap.desc: Swaps the Attack and Sp. Atk stat stages between the user and the target.

guard-swap.name: Guard Swap
guard-swap.desc: Swaps the Defense and Sp. Def stat stages between the user and the target.

last-resort.name: Last Resort
last-resort.desc: This move can only be used after all of the user's other moves have been used.

worry-seed.name: Worry Seed
worry-seed.desc: Changes the target's Ability to Insomnia. Fails against signature Abilities such as Truant or Stance Change.

sucker-punch.name: Sucker Punch
sucker-punch.desc: A first-strike move with priority +1. Fails if the target has not chosen an attacking move.

toxic-spikes.name: Toxic Spikes
toxic-spikes.desc: Sets Toxic Spikes on the target's side. When a foe switches in, it becomes poisoned. Stacking it twice causes badly poison (toxic) instead. No effect on Poison-, Steel-, or Flying-type Pokémon or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability. Removed when a Poison-type Pokémon switches in.

aqua-ring.name: Aqua Ring
aqua-ring.desc: The user keeps restoring 1/16 of its max HP each turn.

magnet-rise.name: Magnet Rise
magnet-rise.desc: For 5 turns, the user becomes airborne (floating). Nullifies the effects of Terrain, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, Spikes, and Ground-type moves.

flare-blitz.name: Flare Blitz
flare-blitz.desc: The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt as recoil. 10% chance to burn the target. Can be used even while the user is frozen, and using it thaws the user.

aura-sphere.name: Aura Sphere
aura-sphere.desc: Ignores accuracy and evasiveness; never misses.

rock-polish.name: Rock Polish
rock-polish.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

dark-pulse.name: Dark Pulse
dark-pulse.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

night-slash.name: Night Slash
night-slash.desc: Raises the critical-hit ratio by 1 stage.

air-slash.name: Air Slash
air-slash.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

bug-buzz.name: Bug Buzz
bug-buzz.desc: A sound-based move. 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage. Hits through Substitute.

dragon-rush.name: Dragon Rush
dragon-rush.desc: Never misses and deals double power against a target in the middle of Minimize. 20% chance to flinch.

drain-punch.name: Drain Punch
drain-punch.desc: Restores HP equal to 1/2 of the damage dealt. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

focus-blast.name: Focus Blast
focus-blast.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

energy-ball.name: Energy Ball
energy-ball.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

brave-bird.name: Brave Bird
brave-bird.desc: The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt as recoil.

earth-power.name: Earth Power
earth-power.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
switcheroo.desc: Swaps the user's held item with the target's. Succeeds even if only one side is holding an item.

giga-impact.name: Giga Impact
giga-impact.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

nasty-plot.name: Nasty Plot
nasty-plot.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

bullet-punch.name: Bullet Punch
bullet-punch.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first. Powered up 1.2x by the Ability Iron Fist.

avalanche.name: Avalanche
avalanche.desc: A priority -4 move that strikes last. Power doubles if the user took damage from the target's move this turn.

ice-shard.name: Ice Shard
ice-shard.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first.

thunder-fang.name: Thunder Fang
thunder-fang.desc: 10% chance to cause paralysis. 10% chance to cause flinch.

ice-fang.name: Ice Fang
ice-fang.desc: 10% chance to cause freeze. 10% chance to cause flinch.

fire-fang.name: Fire Fang
fire-fang.desc: 10% chance to cause burn. 10% chance to cause flinch.

shadow-sneak.name: Shadow Sneak
shadow-sneak.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first.

zen-headbutt.name: Zen Headbutt
zen-headbutt.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

flash-cannon.name: Flash Cannon
flash-cannon.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

defog.name: Defog
defog.desc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 1 stage. If the target is behind a Substitute, only the evasiveness-lowering effect fails.

trick-room.name: Trick Room
trick-room.desc: A priority -7 move that acts last. For 5 turns, Pokémon act in order from lowest Speed to highest. No effect against priority moves. Using it again cancels the effect.

draco-meteor.name: Draco Meteor
draco-meteor.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

leaf-storm.name: Leaf Storm
leaf-storm.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

rock-wrecker.name: Rock Wrecker
rock-wrecker.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

cross-poison.name: Cross Poison
cross-poison.desc: Critical-hit ratio +1. 10% chance to poison the target.

iron-head.name: Iron Head
iron-head.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

stealth-rock.name: Stealth Rock
stealth-rock.desc: Sets Stealth Rock on the field. When the target switches in, the incoming Pokémon takes damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP (adjusted by type effectiveness; up to 1/2 of max HP if 4x weak).

grass-knot.name: Grass Knot
grass-knot.desc: The heavier the target, the greater the power (20 to 120). Determined by weight: under 10kg = 20 / under 25kg = 40 / under 50kg = 60 / under 100kg = 80 / under 200kg = 100 / 200kg or more = 120.

bug-bite.name: Bug Bite
bug-bite.desc: Steals the target's Berry and the user immediately eats it.

charge-beam.name: Charge Beam
charge-beam.desc: 70% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

wood-hammer.name: Wood Hammer
wood-hammer.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/3 of the damage dealt.

aqua-jet.name: Aqua Jet
aqua-jet.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first.

head-smash.name: Head Smash
head-smash.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 of the damage dealt.

wide-guard.name: Wide Guard
wide-guard.desc: A priority +3 move that strikes first. For 1 turn, the user and its allies are protected from multi-target moves.

guard-split.name: Guard Split
guard-split.desc: Adds the user's and target's Defense and Sp. Def together, then splits each evenly between them.

power-split.name: Power Split
power-split.desc: Adds the user's and target's Attack and Sp. Atk together, then splits each evenly between them.

wonder-room.name: Wonder Room
wonder-room.desc: For 5 turns, the Defense and Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon are swapped. Using it again cancels the effect.

psyshock.name: Psyshock
psyshock.desc: A special move that calculates damage using the target's Defense instead of its Sp. Def.

venoshock.name: Venoshock
venoshock.desc: Power doubles if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

rage-powder.name: Rage Powder
rage-powder.desc: A priority +2 move that strikes first. This turn, the user takes all of the target's moves in its place (excluding spread moves that hit all). No effect on Grass-type Pokémon, Pokémon with the Overcoat Ability, or those holding Safety Goggles. For Double Battles.

magic-room.name: Magic Room
magic-room.desc: For 5 turns, the effects of all Pokémon's held items are nullified.

smack-down.name: Smack Down
smack-down.desc: Makes Ground-type moves hit Levitate/Flying-type Pokémon. Also hits airborne targets, and cancels Fly/Bounce/Magnet Rise. Negates Magnet Rise.

storm-throw.name: Storm Throw
storm-throw.desc: Never misses and always lands a critical hit.

quiver-dance.name: Quiver Dance
quiver-dance.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage each.

heavy-slam.name: Heavy Slam
heavy-slam.desc: Never misses and deals double power against a target using Minimize. The heavier the user is compared to the target, the higher the power: 1/5 or less of the user's weight 120 / 1/4 or less 100 / 1/3 or less 80 / 1/2 or less 60 / heavier than that 40.

electro-ball.name: Electro Ball
electro-ball.desc: The faster the user's Speed is compared to the target, the higher the power. Power by ratio (user/target): less than 1x → 40, less than 2x → 60, less than 3x → 80, less than 4x → 120, 4x or more → 150.

soak.name: Soak
soak.desc: Changes the target's type to Water.

flame-charge.name: Flame Charge
flame-charge.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

coil.name: Coil
coil.desc: Raises the user's Attack, Defense, and accuracy by 1 stage each.

low-sweep.name: Low Sweep
low-sweep.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

acid-spray.name: Acid Spray
acid-spray.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

foul-play.name: Foul Play
foul-play.desc: A physical move that calculates damage using the target's Attack stat instead of the user's.

simple-beam.name: Simple Beam
simple-beam.desc: Changes the target's Ability to Simple.

entrainment.name: Entrainment
entrainment.desc: Changes the target's Ability to the same as the user's Ability.

after-you.name: After You
after-you.desc: Lets the target move immediately after, regardless of Speed. For Double Battles.

round.name: Round
round.desc: A sound move. When other Pokémon also use Round in the same turn, they act consecutively ignoring Speed, and from the second user onward the power is doubled. Hits through Substitute. For Double Battles.

clear-smog.name: Clear Smog
clear-smog.desc: Resets all stat stage changes to normal. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness and never misses.

stored-power.name: Stored Power
stored-power.desc: Power increases by 20 for each +1 stat stage the user has.

quick-guard.name: Quick Guard
quick-guard.desc: A priority +3 move. For one turn, the user and its allies are protected from priority moves.

ally-switch.name: Ally Switch
ally-switch.desc: A priority +2 move. Swaps the positions of the user and its ally. Consecutive use lowers the success rate to 1/3. For Double Battles.

scald.name: Scald
scald.desc: 30% chance to burn the target. Can be used even while the user is frozen, and using it thaws the user. Also thaws a frozen target.

shell-smash.name: Shell Smash
shell-smash.desc: Lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and Sp. Def by 1 stage, and raises Attack by 2 stages, Sp. Atk by 2 stages, and Speed by 2 stages.

heal-pulse.name: Heal Pulse
heal-pulse.desc: Restores the target's HP by 1/2 of its max HP (cannot target the user).

hex.name: Hex
hex.desc: Power is doubled when the target has a status condition.

circle-throw.name: Circle Throw
circle-throw.desc: A priority -6 move that goes last. After attacking, forces the target to switch out.

quash.name: Quash
quash.desc: Makes the target act last, ignoring Speed. Fails on a target that has already acted. For Double Battles.

acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
acrobatics.desc: Power is doubled when the user is holding no item.

reflect-type.name: Reflect Type
reflect-type.desc: Changes the user's type to match the target's.

final-gambit.name: Final Gambit
final-gambit.desc: Deals damage equal to the user's HP to the target, and the user faints. No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon; otherwise ignores type matchups.

volt-switch.name: Volt Switch
volt-switch.desc: After attacking, the user switches out with a party Pokémon.

struggle-bug.name: Struggle Bug
struggle-bug.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
bulldoze.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage. Power is halved on Grassy Terrain.

frost-breath.name: Frost Breath
frost-breath.desc: Never misses and always lands a critical hit.

dragon-tail.name: Dragon Tail
dragon-tail.desc: A priority -6 move that goes last. After attacking, forces the target to switch out.

electroweb.name: Electroweb
electroweb.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

wild-charge.name: Wild Charge
wild-charge.desc: The user takes recoil equal to 1/4 of the damage dealt.

horn-leech.name: Horn Leech
horn-leech.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

sacred-sword.name: Sacred Sword
sacred-sword.desc: Deals damage ignoring the target's stat stage changes.

razor-shell.name: Razor Shell
razor-shell.desc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

heat-crash.name: Heat Crash
heat-crash.desc: Never misses and deals double power against a target using Minimize. The heavier the user is compared to the target, the higher the power: 1/5 or less of the user's weight 120 / 1/4 or less 100 / 1/3 or less 80 / 1/2 or less 60 / more than that 40.

cotton-guard.name: Cotton Guard
cotton-guard.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 3 stages.

night-daze.name: Night Daze
night-daze.desc: 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.desc: 30% chance to confuse the target for 1-4 turns. Never misses in rain; accuracy drops to 50% in harsh sunlight. Also hits targets in the semi-invulnerable turn of Fly, Bounce, or Sky Drop.

fiery-dance.name: Fiery Dance
fiery-dance.desc: 50% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

snarl.name: Snarl
snarl.desc: Sound-based move. 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage. Bypasses Substitute.

icicle-crash.name: Icicle Crash
icicle-crash.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

belch.name: Belch
belch.desc: Traps the target for 4-5 turns. While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn and cannot switch out (except Ghost-type Pokémon).

rototiller.name: Rototiller
rototiller.desc: Priority +1 move. Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage.

sticky-web.name: Sticky Web
sticky-web.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

trick-or-treat.name: Trick-or-Treat
trick-or-treat.desc: Sound-based move. Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1 stage each. Bypasses Substitute.

noble-roar.name: Noble Roar
noble-roar.desc: Turns the field into Grassy Terrain for 5 turns. Grounded Pokémon restore 1/16 of their max HP each turn, and Grass-type moves are boosted by 1.3x. The power of Earthquake/Bulldoze-type moves is halved (1/2).

ion-deluge.name: Ion Deluge
ion-deluge.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

parabolic-charge.name: Parabolic Charge
parabolic-charge.desc: Priority +1 move. Hits 2-5 times in a row.

forests-curse.name: Forest’s Curse
forests-curse.desc: Priority +4 move. Fully protects the user from the target's moves for 1 turn. Deals 1/8 of the max HP in damage to attackers that make contact. Consecutive use lowers the success rate to 1/3.

petal-blizzard.name: Petal Blizzard
petal-blizzard.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

disarming-voice.name: Disarming Voice
disarming-voice.desc: Never misses and deals 2x power against targets using Minimize. This move is both Fighting- and Flying-type.

parting-shot.name: Parting Shot
parting-shot.desc: Changes the target's next move to Electric-type.

topsy-turvy.name: Topsy-Turvy
topsy-turvy.desc: Reverses all of the target's stat stage changes (e.g., +1 becomes -1, -2 becomes +2).

crafty-shield.name: Crafty Shield
crafty-shield.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

flower-shield.name: Flower Shield
flower-shield.desc: If this move knocks out the target, raises the user's Attack by 3 stages.

misty-terrain.name: Misty Terrain
misty-terrain.desc: Adds the Grass type to the target's types.

electrify.name: Electrify
electrify.desc: Prevents all Pokémon on the field from switching out until the end of the next turn.

fairy-wind.name: Fairy Wind
fairy-wind.desc: Raises an ally's Sp. Def by 1 stage (for Double Battles).

moonblast.name: Moonblast
moonblast.desc: Adds the Ghost type to the target's types.

boomburst.name: Boomburst
boomburst.desc: Super effective against Water-type Pokémon as well.

fairy-lock.name: Fairy Lock
fairy-lock.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

confide.name: Confide
confide.desc: Turns the field into Misty Terrain for 5 turns. Grounded Pokémon cannot be affected by status conditions, and the power of Dragon-type moves is halved (1/2).

diamond-storm.name: Diamond Storm
diamond-storm.desc: Vanishes on the first turn and attacks on the second. While vanished, the user avoids almost all moves. Bypasses protective moves such as King's Shield, Spiky Shield, Detect, and Protect.

mystical-fire.name: Mystical Fire
mystical-fire.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

eerie-impulse.name: Eerie Impulse
eerie-impulse.desc: Priority +4 move. Fully protects the user from the target's damaging moves only for 1 turn. Lowers the Attack of attackers that make contact by 1 stage. Consecutive use lowers the success rate to 1/3.

venom-drench.name: Venom Drench
venom-drench.desc: Can only be used after the user has eaten a Berry.

powder.name: Powder
powder.desc: Raises the Defense and Sp. Def of the user and allies with the Plus or Minus Ability by 1 stage each.

geomancy.name: Geomancy
geomancy.desc: Sets up Sticky Web on the field. When an opposing Pokémon switches in, its Speed is lowered by 1 stage. No effect on Flying-type Pokémon or those with the Levitate Ability.

happy-hour.name: Happy Hour
happy-hour.desc: Turns the field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns. Grounded Pokémon cannot fall asleep (immune to sleep and Yawn), and Electric-type moves are boosted by 1.3x.

electric-terrain.name: Electric Terrain
electric-terrain.desc: Sound-based move. Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1 stage each, then the user switches out. Bypasses Substitute.

origin-pulse.name: Origin Pulse
origin-pulse.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 of the damage dealt.

all-out-pummeling--special.name: All-Out Pummeling
all-out-pummeling--special.desc: Sound-based move. Cures the target's burn. Hits through Substitute.

continental-crush--special.name: Continental Crush
continental-crush--special.desc: Sound-based move. After attacking, lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage. Hits through Substitute.

savage-spin-out--special.name: Savage Spin-Out
savage-spin-out--special.desc: For 5 turns, turns the field into Psychic Terrain. Grounded Pokémon deal 1.3x with Psychic-type moves, cannot be hit by priority moves, and a holder of a Psychic Seed gains Sp. Def +1.

hydro-vortex--special.name: Hydro Vortex
hydro-vortex--special.desc: Priority +4; moves first. For 1 turn, fully blocks the target's moves. Poisons any foe that uses a contact move on the user. Consecutive use drops the success rate to 1/3.

bloom-doom--special.name: Bloom Doom
bloom-doom--special.desc: Restores HP equal to the target's Attack stat and lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage. If the Attack stat cannot be lowered, only restores HP. Fails if the target's Attack is already at the lowest stage.

gigavolt-havoc--special.name: Gigavolt Havoc
gigavolt-havoc--special.desc: Priority +2; moves first. Only succeeds on the first turn after the user enters battle.

black-hole-eclipse--special.name: Black Hole Eclipse
black-hole-eclipse--special.desc: If the user could not act on the previous turn (e.g., missed/failed/paralysis/confusion/flinch), power is doubled (2x).

twinkle-tackle--special.name: Twinkle Tackle
twinkle-tackle--special.desc: Power increases by +20 for each +1 stat stage the user has.

catastropika.name: Catastropika
catastropika.desc: Can only be used while it is snowing. For 5 turns, halves the physical and special damage the user and its allies take from foes. With multiple allies (Double Battle), it is 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Stays in effect even after switching.

baneful-bunker.name: Baneful Bunker
baneful-bunker.desc: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by 2 stages.

spirit-shackle.name: Spirit Shackle
spirit-shackle.desc: Prevents non-Ghost-type targets from fleeing or switching out. The effect ends if the user leaves the field.

darkest-lariat.name: Darkest Lariat
darkest-lariat.desc: Deals damage while ignoring the target's stat stage changes.

sparkling-aria.name: Sparkling Aria
sparkling-aria.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

ice-hammer.name: Ice Hammer
ice-hammer.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

floral-healing.name: Floral Healing
floral-healing.desc: Removes the target's Aurora Veil, Reflect, and Light Screen, then attacks.

solar-blade.name: Solar Blade
solar-blade.desc: Charges on the first turn, attacks on the second. In harsh sunlight, skips the charge and attacks immediately. In rain/snow/sandstorm, power is halved (1/2).

throat-chop.name: Throat Chop
throat-chop.desc: For 2 turns, seals the target's sound-based moves (it cannot use sound moves such as Sing, Roar, Hyper Voice, etc.).

pollen-puff.name: Pollen Puff
pollen-puff.desc: Deals damage to a foe; restores an ally's HP by 1/2 of its max HP.

fire-lash.name: Fire Lash
fire-lash.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

burn-up.name: Burn Up
burn-up.desc: After attacking, the user loses its Fire type. Fails if the user is not Fire-type. Can be used even while frozen, and using it cures the user's freeze.

speed-swap.name: Speed Swap
speed-swap.desc: Swaps the user's Speed stat with the target's.

smart-strike.name: Smart Strike
smart-strike.desc: Ignores accuracy and evasiveness; never misses.

trop-kick.name: Trop Kick
trop-kick.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

instruct.name: Instruct
instruct.desc: Forces the target to immediately use the last move it used, again on the spot.

beak-blast.name: Beak Blast
beak-blast.desc: Priority -3; moves last. If hit by a contact move before this move activates, burns that attacker (and this move still activates normally).

tearful-look.name: Tearful Look
tearful-look.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1 stage. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness, never misses, and bypasses protection moves like Protect.

zippy-zap.name: Zippy Zap
zippy-zap.desc: Immediately eats the held Berry and raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

pika-papow.name: Pika Papow
pika-papow.desc: Changes the target's type to Psychic. No effect on Grass-type Pokémon, Pokémon with the Overcoat Ability, or holders of Safety Goggles.

buzzy-buzz.name: Buzzy Buzz
buzzy-buzz.desc: Immediately triggers the held Berry of every Pokémon on the field.

no-retreat.name: No Retreat
no-retreat.desc: Raises all of the user's stats (Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed) by 1 stage at once. The user roots itself to the ground and can no longer switch out.

dragon-darts.name: Dragon Darts
dragon-darts.desc: Attacks twice in a row in one turn. Against two foes, hits each once. However, when damage cannot be dealt to one (due to Protect, type matchups, etc.), it hits the other one twice.

max-flare.name: Max Flare
max-flare.desc: Sound-based move. Attacks the target and restores HP equal to the damage dealt.

max-flutterby.name: Max Flutterby
max-flutterby.desc: Calculates damage using the user's Defense stat (Defense stat stages also apply).

max-lightning.name: Max Lightning
max-lightning.desc: Raises the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 2 stages. For Double Battles.

max-knuckle.name: Max Knuckle
max-knuckle.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

max-geyser.name: Max Geyser
max-geyser.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage. When Morpeko is in Full Belly Mode, this becomes an Electric-type move; in Hangry Mode, it becomes a Dark-type move.

max-airstream.name: Max Airstream
max-airstream.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

max-mindstorm.name: Max Mindstorm
max-mindstorm.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

max-rockfall.name: Max Rockfall
max-rockfall.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. Power is boosted to 1.5x while Gravity is in effect.

max-overgrowth.name: Max Overgrowth
max-overgrowth.desc: Restores 1/4 of max HP to the user and all allies. Allies with the Water Absorb or Storm Drain Ability are unaffected (their Ability negates it).

drum-beating.name: Drum Beating
drum-beating.desc: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP (HP is lost even if the move is blocked by Protect, etc.).

spirit-break.name: Spirit Break
spirit-break.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

false-surrender.name: False Surrender
false-surrender.desc: Priority +1 move. (Fails if the user did not deal damage to the target on the previous turn.)

flip-turn.name: Flip Turn
flip-turn.desc: In Psychic Terrain, power is multiplied by 1.5. Hits all opposing Pokémon (in Double Battles, damage is multiplied by 0.75).

triple-axel.name: Triple Axel
triple-axel.desc: Destroys the active terrain. Fails if no terrain is in effect.

dual-wingbeat.name: Dual Wingbeat
dual-wingbeat.desc: Hits 2-5 times in a row. After attacking, lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and raises its Speed by 1 stage.

scorching-sands.name: Scorching Sands
scorching-sands.desc: Charges on the first turn (raising the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage), then attacks on the second turn.

jungle-healing.name: Jungle Healing
jungle-healing.desc: Attacks using whichever is higher, physical or special. 20% chance to badly poison the target.

wicked-blow.name: Wicked Blow
wicked-blow.desc: After attacking, the user faints. If Misty Terrain is in effect and the user is on the ground (not a Flying-type, not having Levitate, etc.), power is multiplied by 1.5.

surging-strikes.name: Surging Strikes
surging-strikes.desc: A priority +1 move. Only when Grassy Terrain is in effect and the user is on the ground (not a Flying-type, not having Levitate, etc.).

thunder-cage.name: Thunder Cage
thunder-cage.desc: If Electric Terrain is in effect and the target is on the ground, power is doubled (if the user is also on the ground, the Electric Terrain 1.3x boost is added on top).

dragon-energy.name: Dragon Energy
dragon-energy.desc: Under terrain conditions, the move's type changes and power is doubled (only when on the ground; the terrain's 1.3x boost is also added). Grassy = Grass, Misty = Fairy, Electric = Electric, Psychic = Psychic.

freezing-glare.name: Freezing Glare
freezing-glare.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

fiery-wrath.name: Fiery Wrath
fiery-wrath.desc: Burns targets whose stats were raised this turn (stat boosts on switch-in are also included).

thunderous-kick.name: Thunderous Kick
thunderous-kick.desc: If the user's stats were lowered this turn, power is doubled (stat drops on switch-in are also included).

glacial-lance.name: Glacial Lance
glacial-lance.desc: Attacks using the target's held item. Fails if the target holds no item.

astral-barrage.name: Astral Barrage
astral-barrage.desc: Removes the held items of Pokémon holding items.

eerie-spell.name: Eerie Spell
eerie-spell.desc: Raises the Attack and Defense of all allies except the user by 1 stage (for Double Battles).

dire-claw.name: Dire Claw
dire-claw.desc: After attacking, the user switches out with a party Pokémon.

psyshield-bash.name: Psyshield Bash
psyshield-bash.desc: After attacking, 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

stone-axe.name: Stone Axe
stone-axe.desc: 30% chance to burn the target. Can be used even while the user is frozen, and using it thaws the user's freeze.

mountain-gale.name: Mountain Gale
mountain-gale.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

barb-barrage.name: Barb Barrage
barb-barrage.desc: 50% chance to poison the target. If the target is already poisoned, power is doubled.

bitter-malice.name: Bitter Malice
bitter-malice.desc: A sound move. Lowers the PP of the target's last used move by 3. Bypasses Substitute.

shelter.name: Shelter
shelter.desc: 30% chance to inflict one of poison, paralysis, or sleep on the target.

triple-arrows.name: Triple Arrows
triple-arrows.desc: Raises critical-hit ratio by 1. 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. 30% chance to make the target flinch.

ceaseless-edge.name: Ceaseless Edge
ceaseless-edge.desc: After attacking, sets Spikes on the target's side.

sandsear-storm.name: Sandsear Storm
sandsear-storm.desc: The user becomes locked in rampage, attacking for 2-3 turns in a row. Afterward, the user becomes confused for 1-4 turns.

lunar-blessing.name: Lunar Blessing
lunar-blessing.desc: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt as recoil.

axe-kick.name: Axe Kick
axe-kick.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and Sp. Def by 1 stage. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

last-respects.name: Last Respects
last-respects.desc: Power increases by +50 for each fainted ally (up to 300).

order-up.name: Order Up
order-up.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

jet-punch.name: Jet Punch
jet-punch.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

spicy-extract.name: Spicy Extract
spicy-extract.desc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.

spin-out.name: Spin Out
spin-out.desc: 30% chance to burn the target. If the target has a status condition, power is doubled.

fillet-away.name: Fillet Away
fillet-away.desc: 30% chance to confuse the target for 1-4 turns. If the attack misses or fails (such as against Protect), the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its maximum HP.

kowtow-cleave.name: Kowtow Cleave
kowtow-cleave.desc: Ignores accuracy and evasiveness; never misses.

flower-trick.name: Flower Trick
flower-trick.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

aqua-step.name: Aqua Step
aqua-step.desc: A priority +1 move. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

raging-bull.name: Raging Bull
raging-bull.desc: When used by Paldean Tauros, its type changes with the form (Fighting / Fire / Water). Removes the target's Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil before dealing damage.

make-it-rain.name: Make It Rain
make-it-rain.desc: 50% chance to make the target flinch.

psyblade.name: Psyblade
psyblade.desc: Hits up to 10 times in a row until it misses.

electro-drift.name: Electro Drift
electro-drift.desc: Inflicts the Salt Cure status on the target, causing slip damage of 1/16 of its maximum HP each turn. Steel- and Water-type Pokémon take 1/8 of their maximum HP instead.

chilly-reception.name: Chilly Reception
chilly-reception.desc: Removes binding moves affecting the user and entry hazards on the user's side (Sticky Web, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, etc.). 100% chance to poison the target.

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

trailblaze.name: Trailblaze
trailblaze.desc: Never misses (ignores accuracy and evasiveness). Always lands a critical hit.

chilling-water.name: Chilling Water
chilling-water.desc: Sound-based move. 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage. Bypasses Substitute.

hyper-drill.name: Hyper Drill
hyper-drill.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

rage-fist.name: Rage Fist
rage-fist.desc: Power increases by 50 each time the user is hit by an attack. The accumulated boost resets at the end of the turn.

armor-cannon.name: Armor Cannon
armor-cannon.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1 stage each.

aqua-cutter.name: Aqua Cutter
aqua-cutter.desc: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to create a substitute, then switches out to a party member. The substitute's HP equals 1/4 of max HP.

blazing-torque.name: Blazing Torque
blazing-torque.desc: Sets the weather to snow for 5 turns, then switches out to a party member.

wicked-torque.name: Wicked Torque
wicked-torque.desc: Removes the user's and the target's Substitute, as well as Sticky Web, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Stealth Rock. Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage.

noxious-torque.name: Noxious Torque
noxious-torque.desc: Sets the weather to snow for 5 turns (Ice-type Pokémon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5x).

combat-torque.name: Combat Torque
combat-torque.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

magical-torque.name: Magical Torque
magical-torque.desc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

blood-moon.name: Blood Moon
blood-moon.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

matcha-gotcha.name: Matcha Gotcha
matcha-gotcha.desc: Restores HP equal to 1/2 of the damage dealt. Also has a 20% chance to burn the target. Can be used even while the user is frozen, and doing so thaws the user. Also thaws the target's freeze.

syrup-bomb.name: Syrup Bomb
syrup-bomb.desc: 100% chance to soak the target in syrup. For 3 turns, the target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn.

electro-shot.name: Electro Shot
electro-shot.desc: On turn 1, raises the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage; on turn 2, attacks. In rain, attacks immediately with no charging turn.

tera-starstorm.name: Tera Starstorm
tera-starstorm.desc: Restores HP equal to 1/2 of the damage dealt.

burning-bulwark.name: Burning Bulwark
burning-bulwark.desc: Cannot be used twice in a row.

thunderclap.name: Thunderclap
thunderclap.desc: Deals back 1.5x the last damage taken. Fails if no damage was taken. Ignores type matchups.

hard-press.name: Hard Press
hard-press.desc: Power increases the more HP the target has remaining (1–100). Formula: 100 × target's current HP ÷ target's max HP.

dragon-cheer.name: Dragon Cheer
dragon-cheer.desc: Sound-based move. Raises the critical-hit ratio of all allies by 1 stage. Dragon-type allies get +2. Fails if already in effect.

alluring-voice.name: Alluring Voice
alluring-voice.desc: Sound-based move. Confuses for 1–4 turns any target whose stats were raised this turn (including stat boosts on switch-in). Bypasses Substitute.

temper-flare.name: Temper Flare
temper-flare.desc: If the user had a stat lowered on the previous turn, power is doubled.

supercell-slam.name: Supercell Slam
supercell-slam.desc: Never misses and deals double power against a Minimized target. If the attack misses or fails (e.g., the target uses Protect), the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

psychic-noise.name: Psychic Noise
psychic-noise.desc: Sound-based move. 100% chance to inflict Heal Block on the target for 2 turns (cannot restore HP via healing moves, Abilities, or items). Bypasses Substitute.

upper-hand.name: Upper Hand
upper-hand.desc: Priority +3 move. 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the target has not selected a priority move or has already moved.

koinbeam.name: Coin Beam
koinbeam.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

honoonopanchi.name: Fire Punch
honoonopanchi.desc: 10% chance to burn the target. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

reitoupanchi.name: Ice Punch
reitoupanchi.desc: 10% chance to freeze the target. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

kaminaripanchi.name: Thunder Punch
kaminaripanchi.desc: 10% chance to paralyze the target. Boosted to 1.2x power by the Iron Fist Ability.

hasamigirochin.name: Guillotine
hasamigirochin.desc: 30% accuracy; faints the target in one hit (OHKO). No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

tsuruginomai.name: Swords Dance
tsuruginomai.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.

fukitobashi.name: Whirlwind
fukitobashi.desc: Priority -6 (moves last). Forces the target to switch out. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness, so it never misses. Bypasses Protect-type defensive moves and Substitute.

sorawotobu.name: Fly
sorawotobu.desc: Flies up on the first turn and attacks on the second turn. While airborne, it avoids most moves except certain ones such as Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Hurricane.

shimetsukeru.name: Bind
shimetsukeru.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

tsunodoriru.name: Horn Drill
tsunodoriru.desc: 30% accuracy; faints the target in one hit (OHKO). No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

noshikakari.name: Body Slam
noshikakari.desc: Never misses and deals 2x power against a target using Minimize. 30% chance to paralyze.

makitsuku.name: Wrap
makitsuku.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

abareru.name: Thrash
abareru.desc: The user becomes locked in (rampage) and attacks for 2-3 consecutive turns. Afterward, the user becomes confused for 1-4 turns.

sutemitakkuru.name: Double-Edge
sutemitakkuru.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/3 of the damage dealt.

kamitsuku.name: Bite
kamitsuku.desc: 30% chance to cause the target to flinch.

hoeru.name: Roar
hoeru.desc: Priority -6 (moves last). Sound-based move. Forces the target to switch out. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness, so it never misses. Bypasses Protect-type defensive moves and Substitute.

utau.name: Sing
utau.desc: Sound-based move. Puts the target to sleep. Bypasses Substitute.

kanashibari.name: Disable
kanashibari.desc: Prevents the target from using its last-used move for 4 turns.

naminori.name: Surf
naminori.desc: Deals 2x damage if the target is underwater (using Dive).

fubuki.name: Blizzard
fubuki.desc: 10% chance to freeze the target. Never misses in snow.

hakaikousen.name: Hyper Beam
hakaikousen.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

ketaguri.name: Low Kick
ketaguri.desc: Power increases the heavier the target is (20-120), determined by weight: under 10kg = 20, under 25kg = 40, under 50kg = 60, under 100kg = 80, under 200kg = 100, 200kg or more = 120.

kauntaa.name: Counter
kauntaa.desc: Priority -5 (moves last). Returns 2x the damage taken from the target's physical attack. In Double Battles, it targets only the last move that hit the user. Ignores type matchups, but has no effect on Ghost-type Pokémon.

chikyuunage.name: Seismic Toss
chikyuunage.desc: Deals fixed damage equal to the user's level (Lv. 50).

yadorigi.name: Leech Seed
yadorigi.desc: Each turn, drains 1/8 of the target's max HP and restores the user's HP by that amount. The effect carries over even if the user switches out. No effect on Grass-type Pokémon.

seichou.name: Growth
seichou.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1 stage each. Raised by 2 stages each in harsh sunlight.

sooraabiimu.name: Solar Beam
sooraabiimu.desc: Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second turn. In harsh sunlight, it attacks immediately with no charge turn; in rain, snow, or sandstorm, its power is halved (1/2).

dokunokona.name: Poison Powder
dokunokona.desc: Poisons the target. No effect on targets holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type, Steel-type, or Poison-type.

shibiregona.name: Stun Spore
shibiregona.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Pokémon holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type or Electric-type.

nemurigona.name: Sleep Powder
nemurigona.desc: Puts the target to sleep. No effect on targets holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type.

hanabiranomai.name: Petal Dance
hanabiranomai.desc: The user becomes locked in (rampage) and attacks for 2-3 consecutive turns. Afterward, the user becomes confused for 1-4 turns.

itowohaku.name: String Shot
itowohaku.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

honoonouzu.name: Fire Spin
honoonouzu.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

denjiha.name: Thunder Wave
denjiha.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Ground-type or Electric-type Pokémon.

kaminari.name: Thunder
kaminari.desc: 30% chance to paralyze the target. Never misses in rain; accuracy drops to 50% in harsh sunlight. Hits even when the target is using Sky Drop, Bounce, or Fly.

jishin.name: Earthquake
jishin.desc: Also hits targets in the semi-invulnerable state of Dig, dealing double damage. Power is halved (1/2) on Grassy Terrain.

jiware.name: Fissure
jiware.desc: Causes the target to faint in one hit. No effect on Flying-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

anawohoru.name: Dig
anawohoru.desc: On the first turn the user digs underground; on the second turn it attacks. While underground, the user avoids most moves except a few such as Earthquake.

dokudoku.name: Toxic
dokudoku.desc: Badly poisons the target (damage increases each turn: 1/16, 2/16, 3/16…). Never misses when used by a Poison-type. No effect on Poison- or Steel-type Pokémon.

saikokineshisu.name: Psychic
saikokineshisu.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

kousokuidou.name: Agility
kousokuidou.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

denkousekka.name: Quick Attack
denkousekka.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first.

naitoheddo.name: Night Shade
naitoheddo.desc: Deals fixed damage equal to the user's level. No effect on Normal-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

iyanaoto.name: Screech
iyanaoto.desc: A sound move. Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages. Bypasses Substitute.

kagebunshin.name: Double Team
kagebunshin.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1 stage.

jikosaisei.name: Recover
jikosaisei.desc: Restores 50% of the user's maximum HP.

chiisakunaru.name: Minimize
chiisakunaru.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. However, certain moves such as Body Slam, Heat Crash, and Flying Press never miss and deal double damage against the user.

hikarinokabe.name: Light Screen
hikarinokabe.desc: For 5 turns, halves damage from the opponent's special attacks. With multiple allies (Double Battles), reduces to 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Remains in effect after switching.

kuroikiri.name: Haze
kuroikiri.desc: Resets the stat stage changes of all Pokémon.

rifurekutaa.name: Reflect
rifurekutaa.desc: For 5 turns, halves damage from the opponent's physical attacks. With multiple allies (Double Battles), reduces to 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Remains in effect after switching.

kiaidame.name: Focus Energy
kiaidame.desc: Raises the user's critical-hit ratio by 2 stages. Fails if already in effect.

takinobori.name: Waterfall
takinobori.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

dowasure.name: Amnesia
dowasure.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

tobihizageri.name: High Jump Kick
tobihizageri.desc: If it misses or fails, the user loses HP equal to half (1/2) of its maximum HP.

hebinirami.name: Glare
hebinirami.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Electric-type Pokémon.

kyuuketsu.name: Leech Life
kyuuketsu.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

goddobaado.name: Sky Attack
goddobaado.desc: Critical-hit ratio +1. Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second. 30% chance to make the target flinch.

henshin.name: Transform
